_readme: Product text translations. Keys are product IDs. Only text fields — no prices, IDs, paths, or config values. Falls back to product JSON defaults if a key is missing.

pre-assembled.name: Star‑A — Fully Built
pre-assembled.description: Fully assembled and tested. Load 3× 18650 batteries, flip the lever, watch jaws drop. Choose UFO or Mushroom — four colourways each. No build required.

ufo-spaceblue.description: Fully assembled and tested. Load 3× 18650 batteries, flip the lever, watch jaws drop. Choose UFO or Mushroom — four colourways each. No build required.

star-a-kit.name: Star‑A — Build-It Kit
star-a-kit.description: Pre-printed parts and a complete electronics kit. Build in around 90 minutes with an adult. No 3D printer, no soldering, no component hunting. Step-by-step illustrated guide included. Choose UFO or Mushroom — four colourways each.

complete-assembly-kit.name: Complete Assembly Kit
complete-assembly-kit.description: Pre-printed parts and a complete electronics kit. Build in around 90 minutes with an adult. No 3D printer, no soldering. Step-by-step illustrated guide included.

electronics-bundle.name: Electronics Bundle
electronics-bundle.description: All electronics pre-wired and ready to assemble — DC motor with Faston connectors, 3-position lever switch, main power switch, 3W LED lamp head, 3× 18650 battery holder, colour-coded wiring harness, and Wago lever terminals. No printed parts included.

printed-parts-ufo.name: UFO Printed Parts Set
printed-parts-ufo.description: All structural parts for the UFO model, professionally printed in PLA+. Includes base body, three tube sections, gear housing, motor bracket, and UFO saucer head. Tight tolerances, guaranteed fit.

printed-parts-mushroom.name: Mushroom Printed Parts Set
printed-parts-mushroom.description: All structural parts for the Mushroom model, professionally printed in PLA+. Includes base body, three tube sections, gear housing, motor bracket, and mushroom cap. Tight tolerances, guaranteed fit.

batteries-3pack.name: 3× Protected 18650 Batteries
batteries-3pack.description: Protected 18650 lithium cells — exactly what the Star‑A needs. Three cells per pack. Protected circuit prevents overcharge, over-discharge, and short circuit.

18650-charger.name: 18650 Battery Charger
18650-charger.description: Compact 4-slot charger for 18650 cells. Charges safely overnight. Automatic shutoff when full.

spare-led.name: 3W Star LED (Spare)
spare-led.description: Warm-white 3W replacement LED lamp head, pre-wired with Wago-ready cables. Tool-free swap. Fits both UFO and Mushroom models.

spare-motor.name: DC Motor (Replacement)
spare-motor.description: Drop-in replacement DC motor. Pre-fitted with Faston connectors — no soldering, no tools needed.

spare-lever-switch.name: 3-Position Lever Switch
spare-lever-switch.description: Up–Off–Down lever control. Pre-wired and ready to fit. The lever that makes the pole rise, stop, and retract.

spare-push-switch.name: Main Power Switch (LED)
spare-push-switch.description: Round push switch with integrated LED indicator. 2A 250V. Pre-wired, push-to-fit.

spare-battery-holder.name: 3× 18650 Battery Holder
spare-battery-holder.description: Protected battery holder with Wago-ready output cables. Holds three 18650 cells. Drop-in replacement for the Star‑A base.

wago-terminals.name: Wago 221 Lever Terminals (10-pack)
wago-terminals.description: Tool-free push-in wire connections. Mix of 2-way (221-412) and 3-way (221-413) terminals — the same ones used in every Star‑A kit.

led-driver.name: Mean Well LDD-700L LED Driver
led-driver.description: 700mA constant-current DC-DC step-down LED driver. Powers the 3W LED head from the 18650 battery pack.
